client_psychology: Clients want to wake up feeling put-together without effort. Lashes are about confidence and saving time on their morning routine. They value consistency — once they find a good lash tech, they rarely switch. Retention is everything. Most clients rebook every 2-3 weeks, making this one of the highest-recurring service niches in beauty.
